name: webstack-marketplace
description: Single-plugin marketplace shipping the webstack fullstack scaffolding harness

plugins.name: webstack
plugins.description: Brand-driven fullstack scaffolding with contract-first APIs (OpenAPI 3.1) and free-tier infra (Vercel + Oracle Cloud Always Free + Supabase + OpenTofu). Stack: NextJS App Router (FSD-lite) + ShadCN + Tailwind v4 / Spring Boot 4 + Kotlin + DDD/Hexagonal + Spring Modulith + KoTest BehaviorSpec.
